sn5.1:1.0.1: Thus have I heard. On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Sāvatthī in Jeta's Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika's Park.
sn5.1:1.0.3: Then it occurred to the bhikkhuni āḷavikā: "Now who is it that recited the verse—a human being or a nonhuman being?" Then it occurred to her: "This is Māra the Evil One, who has recited the verse desiring to arouse fear, trepidation, and terror in me, desiring to make me fall away from seclusion."
sn5.1:1.0.6: Then Māra the Evil One, realizing, "The bhikkhuni āḷavikā knows me," sad and disappointed, disappeared right there.
